justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but sets java.version to 17 instead of 21, missing the target version. It uses Optional.isEmpty() (Java 11+) and @Serial (Java 14+), which are good, but doesn't leverage Java 21 features like records or pattern matching. The removal of Swagger dependencies and @Autowired is appropriate, but the incomplete version bump limits the overall score.
